payload.label: tv
payload.long_description: Large reflective black flat-screen TV with a thin bezel; the dark glass surface fills most of the crop and clearly reflects the room (ceiling fan, two bedside lamps and a dresser), showing mild glare and faint smudges — estimated ~2.0 meters from the camera.
